headline: 3 Reasons to Sell DGX and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since November 2025, Quest has been in a holding pattern, posting a small return of 2.6% while floating around $194.06. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 9.8% gain during that period.
